message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam shadowing false
skinparam sequence {
  ParticipantPadding 40
  BoxPadding 15
  LifeLineBorderColor #777777
  LifeLineBackgroundColor transparent
  ActorBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBorderColor #333333
  ParticipantBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  DatabaseBorderColor #333333
  DatabaseBackgroundColor #E6E6F2
  GroupBorderColor #333333
  GroupBackgroundColor transparent
  AltBorderColor #333333
  AltBackgroundColor transparent
  ArrowColor #333333
  MessageAlign left
}

actor User
participant Frontend
participant API
database Database

group Log in with token
  User -> Frontend : Request token

  alt Token found
    Frontend -> API : Validate token
    activate API
    API -> Database : Find token
    activate Database
    Database --> API : Return matching user
    deactivate Database
    API --> Frontend : Open main page
    deactivate API
  else Token not in database
    Frontend -> API : Validate token
    activate API
    API -> Database : Find token
    activate Database
    Database --> API : Return error
    deactivate Database
    destroy API
    API --> Frontend : Return error
    Frontend --> Frontend : Open loginpage
  end
end

group Log in without token
  User -> Frontend : Enter login information
  User -> Frontend : Accept to be remembered
  User -> Frontend : Press "Log in"

  Frontend -> API : Request validation
  activate API
  API -> Database : Validate login information
  activate Database

  alt validation successful
    Database --> API : Validation successful
    API --> Frontend : Move to main page
    Frontend --> User : Add token to user
  else validation failure
    Database --> API : Validation failed
    deactivate Database
    destroy API
    API --> Frontend : Validation failed
    Frontend --> Frontend : Show error message
    Frontend --> Frontend : Retry login page
  end
end

@enduml
```
